title: Real Business: Neon Audit
objective: Score as many confirmed deals as possible in a 2-4 minute run by tapping the correct business orbs before they vanish, maintaining combo chains, and surviving reputation loss from bad calls.

controls.input: Tap a blue or green orb with a business icon
controls.outcome: Banks points, adds combo, and plays a cash-register or stamp sound

controls.input: Tap a pink glitch orb when the screen announces an Audit Pulse
controls.outcome: Clears a dangerous fake orb for bonus points and protects reputation

controls.input: Do not tap off-rule orbs during the current phase
controls.outcome: Keeps combo alive and avoids reputation damage

steps: Neon orbs drift in from screen edges carrying clear icons like contracts, receipts, ads, and cash.
At the top banner, the current call is always explicit: 'REAL BUSINESS' means tap contract, receipt, and cash orbs; 'HYPE WAVE' means tap ad
Each correct tap fills a combo meter; every 5-hit chain increases the score multiplier.
Every few seconds an Audit Pulse flips the rule for 3 seconds, forcing the player to switch targets fast instead of mindlessly tapping.
Missing too many required orbs or tapping the wrong ones drains the reputation bar.
Orb speed, spawn count, and mixed-pattern feints escalate until the run ends when reputation hits zero.
scoring: Correct taps score 10 points times current multiplier. Consecutive correct taps build combo and raise the multiplier up to x5. Clearing fake hype during Audit Pulse gives a short burst bonus. Final score is submitted toa
tips: Read the top banner first; the active rule matters more than orb color alone.
Use the audio stingers: a firm stamp cue means normal business phase, a siren chirp means Audit Pulse started.
Protect combo by skipping doubtful targets instead of panic tapping.
During late waves, clear edge orbs first because they expire faster.
